PostToolUse.command: if [[ "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == *.js || "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == *.ts || "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == *.jsx || "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == *.tsx ]]; then PRETTIER_CMD='prettier'; if command -v npx &>/dev/null && npx prettier --version &>/dev/null 2>&1; then PRETTIER_CMD='npx prettier'; elif ! command -v prettier &>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; $PRETTIER_CMD --write "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; fi
